context_notes: Phase 58 is a 6-plan service-layer refactor in v1.9 milestone. 4/6 plans complete with all gates passing (1108 tests, JaCoCo 84% line coverage maintained). Branch: gsd/v1.9-season-phases-groups. Two behavior changes shipped so far: D-07 (driver-ranking widens to all phase types) in 58-03 SUMMARY; D-18 (strict Season-delete guard) and D-25 (auto-sync REGULAR phase) still pending in 58-06. Pitfall 4 fix pending in 58-05. The recurring subagent-stop pattern affected ~50% of dispatched executors — typically agents stop while writing test files (after long conversational state) without returning a completion marker. Rescue protocol: copy uncommitted worktree files to main, commit as wip, spawn continuation executor without worktree isolation. This protocol works reliably.
